'''gamoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabanuco|tabanuco]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabanuco|tabanuco]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gamoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæmeteth|gæmeteth]] || [[word:gæmetej|gæmetej]] || [[word:gæmetesh|gæmetesh]] || [[word:gæmete|gæmete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamomototh|gamomototh]] || [[word:gamomotoj|gamomotoj]] || [[word:gamomotosh|gamomotosh]] || [[word:gamomoto|gamomoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamototh|gamototh]] || [[word:gamotoj|gamotoj]] || [[word:gamotosh|gamotosh]] || [[word:gamoto|gamoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamoftoth|gamoftoth]] || [[word:gamoftoj|gamoftoj]] || [[word:gamoftosh|gamoftosh]] || [[word:gamoftof|gamoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gamototho|gamototho]] || [[word:gamotojo|gamotojo]] || [[word:gamotosho|gamotosho]] || [[word:gamotoko|gamotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gamototh|gamototh]] || [[word:gamotoj|gamotoj]] || [[word:gamotosh|gamotosh]] || [[word:gamoto|gamoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gamotothol|gamotothol]] || [[word:gamotojol|gamotojol]] || [[word:gamotoshol|gamotoshol]] || [[word:gamotokol|gamotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gamotothotho|gamotothotho]] || [[word:gamotojojo|gamotojojo]] || [[word:gamotoshosho|gamotoshosho]] || [[word:gamotoko|gamotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gamotothon|gamotothon]] || [[word:gamotojon|gamotojon]] || [[word:gamotoshon|gamotoshon]] || [[word:gamotokon|gamotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gamotothoro|gamotothoro]] || [[word:gamotojoro|gamotojoro]] || [[word:gamotoshoro|gamotoshoro]] || [[word:gamotokoro|gamotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
